name_cn:
ON THE GO BB Bag #️⃣M46839
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip technology. Original factory materials and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic items).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure a 100% authentic feel! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + the latest official website gift box.
20 x 15 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
Front magnetic closure
2 interior pockets
Back slip pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 26.0 cm
Adjustable to: 49.0 cm
Made in France
